productDecision.decision: Use meta-flow-engine as the portability slug and flow-extension-engine as the implementation directory.
productDecision.reason: FLOW-26 current state records slug meta-flow-engine while the reconciled implementation state identifies the actual service implementation in server/src/engine/flows/flow-extension-engine and the Jest suite under server/test/meta-flow-engine.

change.summary: ServiceCodeGenerator now extends MicroserviceBase with ServiceDescriptor serviceId T394, serviceName ServiceCodeGenerator, and flowId FLOW-26. Constructor fields were renamed to avoid conflict with MicroserviceBase accessors.

directTenantContextReferenceNotes: dna-compliance-checker.service.ts contains a DNA rule description string mentioning AsyncLocalStorage; no import or direct tenant-context access was found.

typescript.command: Push-Location server; npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json --pretty false; Pop-Location

staticScans.command: Scanned server/src/engine/flows/flow-extension-engine recursively for throw new, service-base inheritance, nestjs-cls imports, direct tenant-context references, direct SDK imports, and any usage.
